scripts.build: rimraf dist dist-electron && vite build && tsup electron/main.ts electron/preload.ts --format cjs --target node18 --external electron --out-dir dist-electron
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n renderer,main,electron -c cyan,yellow,green "vite" "tsup electron/main.ts electron/preload.ts --format cjs --target node18 --external electron --out-dir dist-electron --watch" "wait-on tcp:5173 file:dist-electron/main.cjs file:dist-electron/preload.cjs && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron dist-electron/main.cjs"
